title: TextDecoder SharedArrayBuffer decode creates &[u8] over shared bytes
invariant: &[u8] memory must not be concurrently mutated

stable_byte.hazard: Rust slice materialization can treat shared JS bytes as stable while JS can mutate the backing storage concurrently
stable_byte.suggested_fix_boundary: Snapshot shared/growable/resizable bytes before Rust receives &[u8]
stable_byte.pr_aperture: TextDecoder shared-byte snapshot only; do not patch S3, fs, writev, or unrelated encodings

fix_boundary: Snapshot shared/growable/resizable bytes before Rust receives &[u8]
pr_aperture: TextDecoder shared-byte snapshot only; do not patch S3, fs, writev, or unrelated encodings
fix_options: Copy SharedArrayBuffer-backed bytes into stable owned storage before creating a Rust slice
do_not_touch: Do not rewrite unrelated TextDecoder encoding paths

evidence.summary: Bun TextDecoder route reaches shared backing bytes through safe JS
evidence.limitation: runtime route evidence only; not memory-safety proof and not analyzer-discovered

evidence.summary: Miri model covers shared-slice aliasing shape outside Bun runtime
evidence.limitation: model evidence only; does not prove the Bun site executed under Miri

trust_boundary: manual candidate; not analyzer-discovered; not proof of repository safety
